continuity.arc_goal: Build unified Health SQLite database (health.db) with cross-pillar queries + read layer (health_query.py) so agent can answer 'how has my ApoB changed and what does Attia say about it' meaningfully via iMessage/BlueBubbles, with weekly Sunday email summaries and spend tracking.

progress_update.summary: Completed scope + plan + bonus (raw_transcript storage). Ran /spectre:scope to define health_query.py (3 subcommands: lab-trend, oura-window, search). Ran /spectre:plan producing plan_health_query.md (STANDARD depth, 4 phases, 17 sub-tasks). As bonus: added raw_transcript column to health_knowledge table, updated health_store.append_entry() to accept and store it, wired engine.py + on_demand.py to pass transcript text through. All 36 tests still passing. Ready to execute health_query.py implementation next session.
